prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第11名，近年 排名持续上升（2021年第15→2026年第11），属全国顶尖工科院校；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，涉及师德师风事件，可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制；抖音热度 排名第56位（较热），短视频曝光中等；近年未见明显投档断档记录；拥有16个A-及以上学科，其中航空宇航科学与技术、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、仪器 科学与技术、材料科学与工程、生物医学工程、管理科学与工程等7个A+学科，学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、 电气工程等北航核心专业大类持续高热推荐；本省2026年考生总数约53.5万，较2025年约46.3万明显增加，物理类考生估算约32.9万，竞争加剧；北航位于北京，属一线城市，对四川考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1162名 、2026年计划缩招约5.6%（使位次数字减小）、本省考生总数明显增加（使竞争加剧）、学校顶尖声誉与王牌专业热度持续（使位次数字减小），以及2026年声誉负面事件的轻微 抑制效应，预计2026年最低位次较2025年略前移（更易进），预测最低位次约1143名，区间1013–1273名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 minimum rankings approximately 1236→1027→1134→1162, overall fluctuating in the 1000–1250 range in recent years, with 2025 baseline around 1162; provincial science/physics category enrollment plans: 110 in 2022, 108 in 2023, 108 in 2024, 107 in 2025; 2026 plan 101, a reduction of about 5.6% from 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking around 11th in 2026, with rankings steadily rising in recent years (15th in 2021→11th in 2026), belonging to the top national engineering universities; 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving teacher ethics incidents, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity ranking 56th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderate; no significant enrollment gaps in recent years; has 16 A- or above disciplines, including 7 A+ disciplines: Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, with top-tier disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronics/Communications, Electrical Engineering and other core majors at Beihang continue to be highly recommended; total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 535,000, a significant increase from about 463,000 in 2025, with physics category candidates estimated at about 329,000, intensifying competition; Beihang is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Sichuan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1162, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 5.6% (making the ranking number smaller), the significant increase in total provincial candidates (intensifying competition), the sustained top reputation and flagship major popularity (making the ranking number smaller), and the slight suppression effect of the 2026 negative reputation incident, the 2026 minimum ranking is expected to shift slightly forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1143, range 1013–1273.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1013–1273, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1000), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Future Aerospace Leading Program and Computing and Intelligent Science; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 1250), it is recommended to choose Tier 3 majors as a safe choice.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 713 → 752 → 688 → 452, with a significant forward shift from 2024 to 2025 (from 688 to 452), and the 2025 baseline is about 452nd. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 10 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 7 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 7, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 11th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top universities nationwide. The 2026 reputation evaluation is significantly negative, involving teacher ethics incidents, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranks 56th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. Beihang is strong in science and engineering, offering only a Social Sciences Experimental Class (including Economics, Administrative Management, Law, English, Translation) in liberal arts. In the corresponding discipline evaluation, Foreign Language and Literature is rated A, Law has no separate rating, and the strength in liberal arts is relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of social science-related majors is divided and wait-and-see. The total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 535,000, a significant increase from 2025, with an estimated 206,000 history category examinees, intensifying competition. Beihang is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Sichuan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 452nd, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province (intensifying competition), and the limited liberal arts programs at Beihang along with the slight suppression effect of negative reputation incidents, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward (harder to enter), with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 467th, and a range of 414–520th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Social Sciences Experimental Class (including: Law, Administrative Management, Economics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Social Sciences Experimental Class (Foreign Language Interdisciplinary Talent Training Experimental Class) (including: English, Translation)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Beihang has very few history category majors in Sichuan (only one major group: Social Sciences Experimental Class). With rankings within the predicted range of 414–520, it is recommended to target this major group as the primary application goal. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 400), admission is highly likely; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., above 510), careful evaluation is needed.
